title: Zephyrous starting WS1 token measurement
body:
Team start report:
- Identity: Zephyrous Circling Current / codex / GPT-5 / 019e26.
- Foundation: start-right-team grounding complete enough to begin WS1; identity preflight passed; active claims and commit queue were empty before claim db6d268b opened.
- Claimed paths: agent-tools/scripts/validate-practice-fitness.ts, agent-tools/src/practice-fitness/**, agentic-engineering thread record, napkin.
- Useful capability: narrow TypeScript implementation and focused validation.
- Constraint or risk: WS1 only; no token frontmatter fields, convention docs, or manifest coverage.
- Preferred boundary: solo implementer unless another live agent appears.

Target: ws1-token-measurement - reusable Practice fitness logic under agent-tools/src/practice-fitness with content-only chars/4 token counts rendered in fitness reports.
